fields.name: ARCTIC
fields.description: Covers Canada’s Arctic Ocean Arctic Archipelago and northern coastal waters

fields.name: GULF
fields.description: Covers the Gulf of St. Lawrence including surrounding coastal and offshore waters

fields.name: MARITIMES
fields.description: Covers the Scotian Shelf Bay of Fundy and offshore Atlantic waters east of Nova Scotia

fields.name: NATIONAL
fields.description: Covers all Canadian regions for national coordination and pan‑Canadian activities

fields.name: NEWFOUNDLAND & LABRADOR
fields.description: Covers Newfoundland and Labrador coastal and offshore Atlantic waters

fields.name: ONTARIO AND PRAIRIE
fields.description: Covers the Great Lakes and inland freshwater systems of central Canada

fields.name: PACIFIC
fields.description: Covers British Columbia coastal and offshore waters in the Pacific Ocean

fields.name: QUEBEC
fields.description: Covers Quebec’s marine waters including the St. Lawrence River and estuary
